entries.title: Trust, reliability, and onboarding correctness pass
highlights: Trust portal at /trust with subprocessors, encryption posture, GDPR/CCPA, and security disclosure path.
Public changelog (this page) so customers can see exactly what shipped each release.
Onboarding fixes: server-tracked progress, unified email/OAuth signup flow, first-energy-log signal wired.
Billing fixes: Customer Portal mounted in Settings, plan changes route to real Stripe (not local-only state), past-due banner.
CI gates: 105-test contract suite now runs on every PR; bundle-size budget added; Lighthouse Perf threshold flipped from warn to error.
Performance: AgentLiveCanvas decode + draw moved to OffscreenCanvas worker; battery-adaptive frame rate; orb animations pause on hidden tabs.

entries.title: Nexus Agent Mode + live screencast
highlights: Agent Mode: Nexus can now drive a real browser on your behalf. Free-tier default uses NVIDIA NIM; BYOK Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini / 5 more for higher quality.
Live screencast: watch the agent navigate in real time via CDP screencast over WebSocket — same architecture Browserbase + OpenAI Operator use.
Persistent browser contexts encrypted in Supabase Vault per user — sites you've signed in to once stay signed in across runs.
Sentry + PostHog observability fully wired with releases, source maps, alert rules, and ownership rules.
Outbound webhooks UI in Settings → Integrations + 5 prebuilt n8n recipes.
